# Holistic Physio

> Holistic Physio is a physiotherapy and acupuncture clinic in Highgate Hill, Brisbane, run by Dr Sandra Tan (Physiotherapist, Doctor of Chinese Medicine, Clinical Pilates Instructor, APA member, AACMA accredited, 20+ years in practice). The clinic treats pain, fatigue and stress at the root by combining physiotherapy, acupuncture, Chinese herbal medicine and clinical Pilates in one personalised plan, rather than offering these as siloed services.

Location: 26 Gladstone Rd (Cnr Brook St), Highgate Hill QLD 4101, Australia. On-site parking via Brook St.
Phone: 07 3844 8202 (+61 7 3844 8202)
Email: info@holisticphysio.com.au
Booking: https://clientportal.zandahealth.com/clientportal/holisticphysioacup
Hours: Monday 10:00am-6:30pm, Tuesday 1:30pm-5:30pm, Thursday 10:00am-6:30pm. Closed Wednesday, Friday, Saturday, Sunday.
Health funds: registered with all major Australian private health funds, HICAPS on-site claiming. Also treats WorkCover, DVA and NDIS-referred patients, and Medicare Chronic Disease Management plan patients (referral required for these three).

## Therapies

- [Physiotherapy](https://holisticphysio.com.au/physiotherapy.html): manual therapy, tailored exercise and posture correction.
- [Acupuncture](https://holisticphysio.com.au/acupuncture.html): gentle, evidence-informed acupuncture for pain, stress, fatigue, digestive issues and fertility.
- [Chinese Herbal Medicine](https://holisticphysio.com.au/chinese-herbal-medicine.html): personalised herbal formulas for women's health, digestion, stress and chronic pain.
- [Clinical Pilates](https://holisticphysio.com.au/clinical-pilates.html): physiotherapist-led, one-on-one sessions for core strength, posture and rehabilitation.

## Conditions treated

- [Pain](https://holisticphysio.com.au/pain.html) — back, neck, joint and muscle pain
- [Chronic Fatigue](https://holisticphysio.com.au/fatigue.html)
- [Stress Management](https://holisticphysio.com.au/stress.html) and [Anxiety & Depression Support](https://holisticphysio.com.au/stress-anxiety-and-depression.html)
- [Digestive Issues](https://holisticphysio.com.au/digestive-issues.html) — bloating, IBS, reflux, gut imbalance
- [Migraines & Headaches](https://holisticphysio.com.au/migraines-and-headaches.html)
- [Sports Injuries](https://holisticphysio.com.au/sports-injuries.html) — rehab, return-to-sport, prevention
- [Women's Health](https://holisticphysio.com.au/womens-health.html) — periods, pregnancy, menopause, fertility
- [Fertility & IVF Support](https://holisticphysio.com.au/fertility.html) and [Fertility Acupuncture](https://holisticphysio.com.au/fertility-acupuncture.html)
- [Work Injuries](https://holisticphysio.com.au/work-injuries.html) — WorkCover-supported rehabilitation

## Service area

Highgate Hill and inner Brisbane suburbs, including West End, South Brisbane, Dutton Park, Woolloongabba, East Brisbane, Kangaroo Point, Fairfield, Annerley, Milton, Toowong, St Lucia, Indooroopilly, Spring Hill, Fortitude Valley, New Farm, Paddington, Greenslopes, Coorparoo, Stones Corner, and other nearby areas — each with a dedicated page under https://holisticphysio.com.au/{suburb-name}.html.
